Stoffel Vandoorne to compete in Formula E with HWA/Mercedes in 2019
Stoffel has signed with the German team HWA AG, which shall be overseen by Toto Wolff next season.

Gaëtan Vigneron (who tweeted about this yesterday), F1 journalist for Belgian media RTBF says Stoffel might be involved with Mercedes in tasks linked to F1, but might also take parts in events with Honda (WEC, or Super Formula), with which he has kept a good relationship.

The Toro Rosso opportunity is not completely closed, but Helmut Marko seems to really want to have a driver from the RedBull program.
